title: Update your Cove
when: A new version of Lucid Cove is out, or you pulled changes.
description: Pull the latest Lucid Cove and rebuild your Cove. Database migrations apply automatically on restart. The paths below are filled in for your box.

steps.label: Pull the latest code
steps.note: This is your lucid-cove clone (the folder you cloned from GitHub).

steps.label: Rebuild + restart
steps.note: This is your Cove folder (the one with docker-compose.yml). Migrations apply automatically on boot.
